mode.label: Active Mode
mode.description: Current operating mode. Shadow is default (always-on, minimal). Graph is user-initiated review. Archetype is opt-in training mode.

quiet_mode.label: Quiet Mode
quiet_mode.description: When active, suppresses ALL whispers, scoring, and reputation updates. Triggered automatically during high emotional intensity or manually by user.

emotional_intensity.label: Emotional Intensity
emotional_intensity.description: Current conversation emotional intensity (0-100). Derived from transcript velocity, Gottman horseman detection, and escalation patterns. Triggers quiet mode at threshold.

quiet_mode_threshold.label: Quiet Mode Threshold
quiet_mode_threshold.description: Emotional intensity level that triggers automatic quiet mode activation.

whispers_delivered.label: Whispers Delivered
whispers_delivered.description: Number of whisper insights delivered in the current conversation. Hard-capped at 2 per conversation in Shadow mode.

max_whispers_per_conversation.label: Max Whispers Per Conversation
max_whispers_per_conversation.description: Maximum whisper insights allowed per single conversation. Default 2. Higher in Archetype mode.

conversation_active.label: Conversation Active
conversation_active.description: Whether a conversation is currently being tracked.

events_detected.label: Events Detected
events_detected.description: Total conversational events detected in this session.

active_contact_id.label: Active Contact
active_contact_id.description: Currently identified conversation partner. Loaded from user's contact list.

archetype_active.label: Active Archetype
archetype_active.description: Currently active archetype for training mode. None when not in Archetype mode.

archetype_alignment.label: Archetype Alignment
archetype_alignment.description: Current conversation alignment score with active archetype (0-100).

trust_delta_session.label: Trust Delta (Session)
trust_delta_session.description: Net trust change with active contact during this conversation.

composure_delta_session.label: Composure Delta (Session)
composure_delta_session.description: Net composure change during this conversation.

influence_delta_session.label: Influence Delta (Session)
influence_delta_session.description: Net influence change with active contact during this conversation.

empathy_delta_session.label: Empathy Delta (Session)
empathy_delta_session.description: Net empathy change during this conversation.

volatility_delta_session.label: Volatility Delta (Session)
volatility_delta_session.description: Net volatility change during this conversation. Positive = more volatile.

assertiveness_delta_session.label: Assertiveness Delta (Session)
assertiveness_delta_session.description: Net assertiveness change during this conversation.

openness_delta_session.label: Openness Delta (Session)
openness_delta_session.description: Net openness change during this conversation.

conflict_risk.label: Conflict Risk
conflict_risk.description: Current real-time conflict probability based on conversation trajectory (0-100).

ego_state_user.label: User Ego State
ego_state_user.description: Current detected Transactional Analysis ego state of the user. Parent = controlling/nurturing. Adult = rational/factual. Child = emotional/creative.

ego_state_other.label: Other Ego State
ego_state_other.description: Current detected ego state of the conversation partner.

horseman_detected.label: Gottman Horseman Detected
horseman_detected.description: Most recent Gottman Four Horseman pattern detected in conversation. These are research-validated predictors of relationship breakdown.

conversation_energy.label: Conversation Energy
conversation_energy.description: Net energy arc of the conversation. Positive = energizing. Negative = draining. Tracked as first-class metric per user request.

debrief_pending.label: Debrief Pending
debrief_pending.description: Whether a post-conversation debrief is available but not yet reviewed.

classification_corrections.label: Classification Corrections
classification_corrections.description: Total number of times the user corrected an AI classification during debrief. Used to improve per-user model accuracy.

streak_count.label: Archetype Streak
streak_count.description: Number of consecutive conversations with archetype alignment above 80%.
